project_context.mission: To create a goal-driven computing platform where software dynamically adapts to human intent.
project_context.rationale: A thundering, revolutionary OS needs to feel like the future. By merging Luxury (deep blacks, cinematic grain/textures, crystal glass) with Swiss Brutalism (stark typography, rigid bento grids, massive contrast), we convey absolute authority and advanced technological capability.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing (p-12, p-16, py-24). Allow the 3D elements and dark canvas to breathe.
layout_and_spacing.grids: The 'Bento' Grid Protocol. Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 with wide gaps (gap-8). Mix span sizes (e.g., col-span-8 for hero, col-span-4 for supporting elements).
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Optical Alignment over Geometric. Heavy use of asymmetrical tension.

glassmorphism.classes: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/[0.02] border border-white/[0.08] shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)] rounded-2xl

cards.classes: bg-[#09090B] border border-white/[0.05] rounded-xl overflow-hidden hover:border-white/[0.15] transition-colors duration-500 p-8

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black font-medium px-6 py-3 rounded-full hover:bg-gray-200 transition-all
buttons.secondary: backdrop-blur-md bg-white/[0.05] border border-white/[0.1] text-white px-6 py-3 rounded-full hover:bg-white/[0.1] transition-all

motion_and_3d.cursor: Implement a custom framer-motion or GSAP cursor. A subtle glowing orb (backdrop-invert or mix-blend-difference) that follows the mouse.
motion_and_3d.webgl_background: Use React Three Fiber + Drei or raw WebGL shaders (Three.js). We need a 'thundering' ambient background: dark, stormy particle clouds, or an abstract fluid simulation with deep kinetic glows that respond slowly to scroll.
motion_and_3d.page_transitions: Lenis for smooth scrolling (MANDATORY). Framer Motion for staggered fade-up on text (y: 20, opacity: 0 to 1).
motion_and_3d.glass_reveal: Cards should have a 'Tracing Beam' or a gradient mask that reveals their border gently on hover.

sections: Hero: Massive 'Goal Computing Labs' title, WebGL interactive background, subtle glass header.
Mission Statement: Full viewport height, typography-driven, staggering text animation.
Belief: 'Software should adapt to humans — not humans to software.' - High impact bento layout.
CTA Split: Navigate to GoalOS (Product) or Contact Us (mailto link).
Hero: 'GoalOS — The world's first Adaptive Goal-Driven Computing Platform.' 3D interactive center-piece.
The Problem vs Solution: Horizontal scroll or split layout. 'Need → Find → Learn' vs 'Need → Describe → Done'.
How GBC Works: 5-step interactive scrollytelling list with changing visual right-pane.
Live Examples: Bento cards showing UI generation (PDF Merge, Invoice, Expenses) appearing dynamically.
Architecture: Visualizing Local vs Cloud layer (Abstract tech nodes).
Target Audience & Comparison Table: Clean, Swiss-style data table.
Founder Profile: Mr. V S S K Sai Narayana.
Photo on one side with aggressive crop/scale, bio and quotes on the right.

founder_photo.description: Founder Mr. V S S K Sai Narayana Profile Photo

abstract_textures.description: Abstract black metallic surface featuring intricate patterns.
Dark abstract close-up of illuminated geometric shapes.

components_instructions.routing: Use React Router DOM for the 4 distinct pages.
components_instructions.shadcn: Heavily customize any Shadcn component used. Remove default borders, apply the glassmorphism variables. Use Shadcn for inputs, dialogs, and tables.
components_instructions.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, links, inputs) MUST have a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-product').
